title: Imposition of monetary penalty: Herbert Smith Freehills CIS LLP Moscow
body: "OFSI imposes a monetary penalty of £465,000 on the UK registered Herbert Smith Freehills CIS LLP Moscow (“HSF Moscow”) in accordance with section 146 of the Policing and Crime Act (“PACA”) 2017. The penalty concerns breaches by HSF Moscow of regulation 12 of the Russia (Sanctions) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019 (the “Russia Regulations”). "
